monthly_program_operating_cost_inr.rationale: Bottom-up: PMO staffing (~30–80 FTEs at gov pay scales) plus third-party audits, SME hardware lifecycle, liaison team, and UMF/cloud hosting; wide spread reflects unknown audit contract value and PMO scope.

sme_admin_overhead_actual_hours_per_week.rationale: Risk 2 failure trigger names >2 hr/week for >40% of sampled SMEs; base set slightly above the cap to reflect realistic burden under deployed tablet tooling, with upper tail in the FM2 collapse region.

voluntary_participation_actual_share.rationale: Risk 5 union resistance and Risk 3 incentive dependency widen the downside; base sits just below the 75% target to reflect realistic SME and unionized-firm dropout pressure across 24 months.

sustained_productivity_retention_actual_.rationale: Expert Issue 2 assumes 50% attrition of grant-driven efficiency in the first 12 months post-expiry as a baseline; base set just below the 75% target to reflect the named decay model.

sme_admin_overhead_cap_hours_per_week.rationale: Plan names 2 hr/week as the SME compliance target; Risk 2 trigger uses the same value as a failure threshold. Spread reflects how tightly the cap is interpreted in operational rollbacks.

voluntary_participation_target_share.rationale: Plan commits to the 75% opt-in threshold; spread reflects sensitivity to how strictly downstream M&E claims rely on the threshold for statistical-power arguments.

sustained_productivity_retention_target_.rationale: Expert Issue 2 names 75% as the formal-review threshold; range reflects that the threshold is a recommendation, not a treaty-fixed value, and downstream policy framings vary.
